heading: This Afternoon
text: Sunny skies. Highs in the upper 70s to lower 80s, some mid 80s in southeastern valleys. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear; some high clouds late near the international border. Lows from the mid 40s to lower 50s, some mid 50s in the Champlain and St Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun occasionally filtering through high clouds, mainly north. Highs the low to mid 80s, except mid to upper 80s in southern valleys, and in the Champlain Valley. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
